compartments.label: NEURONS
compartments.snippet: Gray shaded oval region on the left side of Panel E pathway diagram, containing ADF, URX, AWB, and RIC neuron shapes.

compartments.label: ADF
compartments.snippet: Blue triangle labeled 'ADF' inside the NEURONS region, with gene label tph-1 above it.

compartments.label: URX
compartments.snippet: Yellow hexagon labeled 'URX' inside the NEURONS region, with gene label mod-1 above it; also annotated with open triangle in Panel C/D.

compartments.label: AWB
compartments.snippet: Green triangle labeled 'AWB' inside the NEURONS region, with gene label ser-6 above/beside it.

compartments.label: RIC
compartments.snippet: Red pentagon labeled 'RIC' inside the NEURONS region, with gene label tbh-1 above it.

compartments.label: INTESTINE
compartments.snippet: Green rounded rectangle box on the right side of Panel E, containing nhr-76, ATGL, beta-oxidation, and Fat loss nodes.

genes.snippet: Gene label above the blue ADF triangle in the NEURONS region; also appears as x-axis category in Panel B bar graph.
Gene label above the yellow URX hexagon in the NEURONS region; also used in Pflp-8::mod-1SAS transgene in Panels C and D.
Gene label above/beside the green AWB triangle in the NEURONS region.
Gene label above the red RIC pentagon in the NEURONS region.
Node labeled 'nhr-76' inside the INTESTINE box; has a solid pointed arrow to ATGL.
Node labeled 'ATGL' (in italics, likely atgl-1 per process hint) inside the INTESTINE box; receives arrow from nhr-76 and sends arrow to beta-oxidation/Fat loss.

tentative_edges.snippet: Solid pointed arrow from ADF (tph-1) to URX (mod-1), labeled '5-HT', in Panel E pathway diagram.
Solid pointed arrow from AWB (ser-6) to ADF (tph-1), directed left/upward in Panel E. [unconfirmed against figure in verification]
Solid pointed arrow from RIC (tbh-1) to AWB (ser-6), labeled 'Oct' (octopamine), in Panel E.
Dashed pointed arrow from RIC (tbh-1) to URX (mod-1), indicating an indirect regulatory connection in Panel E.
Dashed pointed arrow from URX (yellow hexagon in NEURONS) crossing into the INTESTINE box, labeled 'endocrine signal' (bold) in Panel E.
Solid pointed arrow from nhr-76 to ATGL within the INTESTINE box in Panel E; consistent with process hint that nhr-76 mediates transcription of atgl-1.
Solid pointed arrow from ATGL to beta-oxidation/Fat loss nodes within the INTESTINE box in Panel E; ATGL activity drives beta-oxidation and fat loss. [unconfirmed against figure in verification]
